A.C. Green

A.C. Green Jr.

(Iron Man)

Position: Power Forward and Small Forward ▪ Shoots: Right

6-9, 220lb (206cm, 99kg)

Born: October 4, 1963 (Age: 62-282d) in Portland, Oregon us

College: Oregon State

High School: Benson Polytechnic in Portland, Oregon

Draft: Los Angeles Lakers, 1st round (23rd pick, 23rd overall), 1985 NBA Draft

NBA Debut: October 26, 1985

Career Length: 16 years

  • 1x All Star
  • 3x NBA Champ
  • 1988-89 All-Defensive
+3

Hall of Fame Probability

Hall of Fame Probability

1.2%

Transactions

June 18, 1985: Drafted by the Los Angeles Lakers in the 1st round (23rd pick) of the 1985 NBA Draft.

July 21, 1993: Released by the Los Angeles Lakers.

September 28, 1993: Signed as an unrestricted free agent with the Phoenix Suns.

December 26, 1996: Traded by the Phoenix Suns with Sam Cassell, Michael Finley and a 1998 2nd round draft pick (Greg Buckner was later selected) to the Dallas Mavericks for Tony Dumas, Jason Kidd and Loren Meyer.

September 1, 1999: Traded by the Dallas Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers for Sean Rooks and a 2000 2nd round draft pick (Pete Mickeal was later selected).

October 31, 2000: Signed as a free agent with the Miami Heat.

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is A.C. Green?

A.C. Green is 62 years old.

Where was A.C. Green born?

A.C. Green was born in Portland, Oregon.

When was A.C. Green born?

A.C. Green was born on October 4, 1963.

How tall is A.C. Green?

A.C. Green is 6-9 (206 cm) tall.

How much did A.C. Green weigh when playing?

A.C. Green weighed 220 lbs (99 kg) when playing.

Is A.C. Green in the Hall of Fame?

A.C. Green is not in the Hall of Fame.

When was A.C. Green drafted?

A.C. Green was drafted by Los Angeles Lakers, 1st round (23rd pick, 23rd overall), 1985 NBA Draft.

What position did A.C. Green play?

Power Forward and Small Forward.

When did A.C. Green retire?

A.C. Green last played in 2001.

What is A.C. Green's net worth?

A.C. Green made at least $41,218,276 playing professional basketball.

How much did A.C. Green make?

A.C. Green made $6,473,000 in 1996.

What did A.C. Green average?

A.C. Green averaged 9.6 points, 7.4 rebounds, and 1.1 assists per game.

How many rings does A.C. Green have?

A.C. Green won 3 championships.

What schools did A.C. Green attend?

A.C. Green attended Benson Polytechnic in Portland, Oregon and Oregon State.

What are A.C. Green's nicknames?

Iron Man is a nickname for A.C. Green.
